scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const target=path.join(os.homedir(),'AppData','Local','HuromataNext');if(!fs.existsSync(target))process.exit(0);for(const name of fs.readdirSync(target)){if(name==='node_modules')continue;fs.rmSync(path.join(target,name),{recursive:true,force:true});}console.log('Cleaned',target);"
